name: WMKF Research Review App Suite - Staff
description: Grants staff access to Wave 1 tables in the Research Review App Suite. Organization-level on shared tables (system settings, app access). User-level on the user-preference table, which holds encrypted per-user secrets and must not be readable across users.

_depthLegend.Basic: User — rows owned by the calling user only
_depthLegend.Local: Business Unit — rows owned within the user's BU
_depthLegend.Deep: Parent:Child BU — user's BU and descendants
_depthLegend.Global: Organization — all rows in the org

privileges._note: Organization-owned. All staff read/write shared settings.
Organization-owned. Admins need to see everyone's grants.
User-owned. Holds encrypted API keys/secrets. Must not be readable across users. Assign/Share deliberately omitted so rows cannot be reassigned or shared.
